acceptance_targets: [ch15-craft-001] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:274-277 includes (a) at least one direct quoted line from an outsider, (b) one observable Ravi action under pressure, and (c) one concrete bodily reaction from Anika; FAIL if the consequence is still delivered primarily as summary phrasing (e.g., "It came as...").

[ch15-booker-001] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:298-383 contains one explicit control attempt from Ravi, one explicit refusal/counter from Anika, and a later negotiated agreement that follows that conflict; FAIL if the exchange remains a single uninterrupted validation arc.

[ch15-dialogue-001] PASS if in revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:334-373 Ravi has at least 3 lines with concrete procedural/work diction and at least 1 line with a visible self-interruption or late correction; FAIL if his lines remain primarily abstract motivational framing.

[ch15-prose-001] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67-220 uses at least 4 distinct sentence shapes for score updates and the exact pattern ", and the score ..." appears no more than 2 times; FAIL otherwise.

[ch15-prose-002] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:122-170 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:270-353 replace at least 3 repeated abstractions ("discipline", "shape", "depth", "pace") with concrete physical detail tied to the same decision point; FAIL if the abstract coaching vocabulary remains dominant.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:274-277 includes (a) at least one direct quoted line from an outsider, (b) one observable Ravi action under pressure, and (c) one concrete bodily reaction from Anika; FAIL if the consequence is still delivered primarily as summary phrasing (e.g., "It came as...").
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the immediate social consequence beat: the narrative summarizes fallout ("Public disappointment had texture. It came as...") instead of staging a concrete humiliating interaction. This replaces scene with explanation at the exact moment consequence should be most embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:274-277 as live action: put one specific outsider interaction on the page (quote + behavior), show Ravi's visible response in real time, and anchor Anika's embodied reaction before moving to the corridor at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:278.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:298-383 contains one explicit control attempt from Ravi, one explicit refusal/counter from Anika, and a later negotiated agreement that follows that conflict; FAIL if the exchange remains a single uninterrupted validation arc.
findings.problem: Post-loss consequence is partially defused by a too-clean repair beat: the corridor exchange moves quickly into mutual insight and stable planning, with minimal friction from the recently coercive father-daughter pattern. That softens the chapter's causal sting after a pivotal defeat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:298-343 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:372-383 to include one failed repair attempt (Ravi defaults to control language; Anika resists), then earn the eventual shared plan through that clash.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if in revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:334-373 Ravi has at least 3 lines with concrete procedural/work diction and at least 1 line with a visible self-interruption or late correction; FAIL if his lines remain primarily abstract motivational framing.
findings.problem: Ravi's register drifts toward polished therapist/coaching abstraction ("It's information", "That's a clean read", "That's ambition") and underuses his style-bible stress tells (procedural repetition, command-then-late-correction, work/schedule lexicon). Voice specificity softens.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Ravi lines in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:334-373 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:436-437 to restore idiolect: concrete workload/scheduling language, one self-correction beat, and more pressure-shaped rhythm instead of generalized coaching labels.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67-220 uses at least 4 distinct sentence shapes for score updates and the exact pattern ", and the score ..." appears no more than 2 times; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: A recurring scoreboard formula (", and the score ..." / "The score ...") appears repeatedly in the match sequence, creating prose autopilot and flattening rally texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary score-reporting constructions across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67-95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:152-159, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:213-219 by tying point outcomes to distinct tactical or bodily consequences instead of repeating the same sentence template.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:122-170 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:270-353 replace at least 3 repeated abstractions ("discipline", "shape", "depth", "pace") with concrete physical detail tied to the same decision point; FAIL if the abstract coaching vocabulary remains dominant.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition of coaching abstractions (e.g., "discipline", "shape", "depth", "pace") compresses tonal range and starts to sound like direct style-bible token reuse rather than fresh scene language.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:122-170 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:270-353, replace repeated abstract coaching nouns with concrete sensory/kinesthetic detail (foot placement, wall contact, breath cadence, shoulder load) while keeping tactical clarity.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
